label: yes
cot_prefix: Okay, let me try to figure out this problem. So there are five people: Alice, Bob, Claire, Dave, and Eve. Each has a present of a different color. Let me start by listing their initial presents: - Alice: green - Bob: purple - Claire: blue - Dave: black ball - Eve: red Now, there are a series of swaps. Let me go through each swap step by step and track who has which present after each swap. First swap: Dave and Claire swap their gifts. So initially, Dave has a black ball and Claire has blue. After swapping: - Claire now has the black ball (from Dave) - Dave now has the blue (from Claire) So after first swap: - Alice: green - Bob: purple - Claire: black - Dave: blue - Eve: red Second swap: Bob and Alice swap their gifts. Bob had purple, Alice had green. After swapping: - Bob has green - Alice has purple So after second swap: - Alice: purple - Bob: green - Claire: black - Dave: blue - Eve: red Third swap: Eve and Bob swap their gifts. Eve had red, Bob had green. After swapping: - Eve has green - Bob has red So after third swap: - Alice: purple - Bob: red - Claire: black - Dave: blue - Eve: green Fourth swap: Bob and Dave swap their gifts. Bob had red, Dave had blue. After swapping: - Bob has blue - Dave has red So after fourth swap: - Alice: purple - Bob: blue - Claire: black - Dave: red - Eve: green Fifth swap: Bob and Eve
